item.title: OLANZAPINE
item.description:
DrugBank ID: db00334
DrugCentral: olanzapine
Synonymous :2-methyl-4-(4-methyl-1-piperazinyl)-10h-thieno[2,3-b][1,5]benzodiazepine | olanzapin | olanzapina | olanzapine | olanzapinum


Drug Sentece Context


Table 1. Analysis of context sentence of olanzapine gene in 1 abstracts.

pmid sentence
32425275 She was administered olanzapine 10 mg with a significant psychopathological improvements being discharged with indications to maintain the treatment.
32601854 Single-day dexamethasone dosing is recommended over multi-day dosing for regimens with high emetogenic risk excluding high-dose cisplatin, preferably in combination with palonosetron, netupitant, and olanzapine.
32663933 Psychopharmacological ongoing treatments should be prioritized and most doses should be reduced 25-50% of original dose if the patient receives lopinavir/ritonavir, with some exceptions including quetiapine, asenapine, olanzapine, sertraline, lamotrigine, bupropion, and methadone. […] (A) In agitated delirium, olanzapine is recommended as first-line antipsychotic and quetiapine should be avoided.
32761196 Rapid discharge (length of stay = 13,8 ± 6,9) with remission of symptoms (BPRS = 27,5 ± 3,1) and satisfactory insight were possible after relatively low-dose antipsychotic treatment (Olanzapine-equivalents = 10,6 ± 5,4 mg).
32858315 The patient received Olanzapine for treatment and his mood problems concurrently improved as indicated by scores of Young Manic Rating Scale (YMRS).
